  "findings": [
    "Backfill lifts exceed the maximum thickness allowable for the compaction equipment in use, preventing proper soil density."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Excavate the non-compliant backfill down to the pipe bedding zone.",
    "Re-backfill in controlled lifts matching the compactor's rated capacity (typically 6 to 8 inches loose lift thickness).",
    "Perform density testing on each lift to verify compliance with project specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "Placing backfill in lifts that are too thick for the compaction equipment prevents achieving the required soil density, which can lead to pipe deflection, joint failure, and ground settlement. This violates standard project specifications and IPC Section 306 requirements for proper pipe support and backfilling.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 306",
    "Project Specifications Section 312333 (Trenching and Backfilling)"
  ]
}
